hero.headline:
Repair quotes.
No stress.
hero.subheadline: Describe the issue once — nearby shops will send you quotes to compare.

feature1.headline: Describe the issue, set your radius
feature1.body: Enter your car details and describe the problem. Shops within your radius receive the request automatically — no calling around.

feature2.headline: Compare quotes side by side
feature2.body: Shops send quotes with comments. Compare prices, distances, and reviews in a single view.

feature3.headline: Manage requests from your dashboard
feature3.body: As a shop, browse incoming requests, ask questions, and send quotes — all in one app.

shopCallout.headline: Win customers in your area
shopCallout.desc: Receive repair requests from drivers in your radius. Quote directly in the app — no middlemen, no commission on quotes.
shopCallout.benefit1Desc: Every request comes from a driver actively looking for a workshop.
shopCallout.benefit2Desc: Clarify details with the driver directly in the app before preparing your offer.
shopCallout.benefit3Desc: Requests only reach workshops within the radius set by the driver.
shopCallout.benefit4Desc: Flat monthly fee. No commission on quotes. No hidden costs.
shopCallout.noteText: already use Autoceny. Join and start receiving requests today.

bottomCta.headline: Fix your car smarter
bottomCta.body: Join drivers who save time and money with Autoceny.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: For drivers and shops
pricing.premiumDesc: Unlimited requests and questions without any limits.
pricing.shopDesc: Receive requests from your area and send quotes.
pricing.shopDisclaimer: Lead volume depends on your area and demand.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How is the search radius calculated?
faq.a1: We use your location (or entered address) as the center and find every shop within the distance you set — straight-line radius in km.
faq.a2: Yes, creating repair requests and receiving quotes is completely free for drivers.
faq.q3: Do shops see each other's quotes?
faq.a3: No. Each shop's quote is private. Only the driver can see and compare all quotes.
faq.q4: When do I see a shop's phone number?
faq.a4: After a shop sends a quote and chooses to share their phone number, it becomes visible on their quote card.
faq.q5: Can I close a request early?
faq.a5: Yes, you can close a request at any time. Open quotes remain visible but no new ones will arrive.
faq.q6: What happens after I mark a shop as 'Interested'?
faq.a6: The shop is notified. If they shared their phone number, you'll see it immediately. You can then contact them directly.
faq.q7: How quickly will I receive quotes?
faq.a7: Shops typically respond within a few hours. Timing depends on the number of shops in your radius and the type of repair.
faq.q8: What types of repairs can I get quotes for?
faq.a8: Any type — from brakes, suspension, and engine work to electronics, air conditioning, and bodywork. Describe the issue and shops will assess if they can help.
faq.q9: How can a shop join the platform?
faq.a9: Click 'Join as a Shop', fill in your business details, and activate your account. The process takes just a few minutes.
faq.a10: Yes. Your contact details are never shared with shops without your consent. Shops only see the issue description, car details, and location.
